tinase production at first but in the later phases of growth there is little enhancement in chitinase production when the dextrose is fully or partially being used up. Sandhya et al.(2004) documented the same pattern of chitinase production with the use of different carbon and nitrogen source for the fungus Trichoderma harzianum. Maximum chitinase activity was observed in Medium IIIconstituting colloidal chitin as carbon source and Yeast extract

as a nitrogen source, compared to the other thre media. The exact mechanism of induction of this enzyme by extra nitrogen source is not known but it is assumed that either Yeast extract supports the mycelial growth and hence enhancement in the initial growth leads to more chitinase production or it could be due to the presence of oligomers of GlcNAc which can directly induce the chitinase gene(De Moraes et al.,2003).
